title: Mildly Roasted Chewy Egyptian Green Beans Tagine
description: A delicious and healthy Egyptian-inspired dish featuring roasted green beans, ideal for a date night.
instructions: Trim the ends of the green beans and cut them in half.
In a large bowl, toss the green beans with olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Transfer the green beans to a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the green beans are roasting, cook the dates in a saucepan over medium heat until they are caramelized, flipping them occasionally.
Add the chicken broth and lemon juice to the saucepan with the dates and bring to a simmer.
Once the green beans are done roasting, add them to the saucepan with the dates and their sauce.
Toss the green beans with the dates and their sauce until they are well coated.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
